CustomField.description: Contact__r.Referred_by_Other_specify__c (CounselingRecord_ClientIntake_Media_Other) - When 'Media' = Other, then this value is required.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact__r.Referred_by_Other_specify__c (CounselingRecord_ClientIntake_Media_Other) - When 'Media' = Other, then this value is required.
CustomField.label: Other_Media_ClientIntake
